global_constants.peak_traffic: 10,000,000 (10M) users clicking buy at exactly 10:00:00 AM
global_constants.hard_constraint: Absolute strong consistency. System downtime is tolerable, but zero overselling — not even one ticket.

rubric_nodes.initial_probe: Tell the candidate today's topic is designing a high-concurrency ticketing system like Ticketmaster, then ask how they plan to start. Give zero guidance.
